description_long: This is a female adult figure dressed in an ancient Egyptian-inspired outfit, featuring a long, draped gown with a deep neckline and a decorative belt at the waist. The figure wears ornate gold jewelry, including wide bracelets, arm cuffs, and large earrings, adding to the regal appearance. Her hair is styled in a straight, shoulder-length bob with blunt bangs, adorned with decorative elements. The sandals are strappy and detailed, matching the gold accessories. The facial features are finely modeled, with defined eyes and lips, and the overall posture is upright with arms extended horizontally. The attire and accessories suggest a historical or ceremonial context, making the figure stand out in an urban environment.
description: A female adult in an ancient Egyptian-style gown with gold jewelry, ornate sandals, and a straight bob hairstyle, standing upright with arms outstretched.
description_view_0: Front view shows the detailed gown, jewelry, facial features, and the full frontal design of the outfit.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, the draping of the gown, and the arm jewelry.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the gown, hairstyle details, and the open back design.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile, gown draping, and jewelry from the opposite side.
attribute_clothing_type: draped historical gown with decorative belt and ornate jewelry
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
attribute_hairstyle: straight shoulder-length bob with blunt bangs
